calendar.matters:
Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate Filed By Edward L. Barraza, Rn.
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on petitioner Edward L. Barraza's Petition for Writ of Mandate.
Dept. 220, Judge: James J. McBride, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Not Reported.

Adam Slote, Esq. appeared with petitioner Edward L. Barraza.
Brett A. Kingsbury, Esq. appeared for defendant Board of registered Nursing, Department of Consumer Affairs, State of California.

The Court's tentative ruling is to DENY the petition.
After hearing oral argument by counsel, the matter is SUBMITTED. The Court shall issue an Order After Hearing.

Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Dec-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER EDWARD BARRAZA's Hearing On Verified Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate.
This matter will be heard by Judge McBride, in Department 220, on January 4, 2012. Judge: Marla Miller, Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918
